engine: SharpWine GEM/Blink interpreter and native ARM64 JIT

policy.authority: SharpWine semantic, state, fault, interpreter/JIT, corpus, and guest-program loading evidence
policy.oracleRole: comparison only; never a capability ceiling or veto
policy.missingHandler: deliberate native GEM/Blink implementation task before masking
policy.failClosed: temporary only while a native implementation is genuinely incomplete

phase6NativeFamilies.name: BMI1
phase6NativeFamilies.programProof: ANDN, BEXTR, BLSR, BLSMSK, BLSI, and TZCNT loaded and executed

phase6NativeFamilies.name: BMI2
phase6NativeFamilies.programProof: BZHI, PDEP, PEXT, MULX, SHLX, SHRX, SARX, and RORX loaded and executed

phase6NativeFamilies.name: RDTSCP
phase6NativeFamilies.programProof: deterministic retired-instruction timestamp and TSC_AUX zero

phase6NativeFamilies.name: AVX
phase6NativeFamilies.programProof: loaded YMM VMOVUPS, VADDPS, and VMOVUPS sequence

phase6NativeFamilies.name: AVX2
phase6NativeFamilies.programProof: loaded YMM VPADDD sequence plus precise gather restart state

phase6NativeFamilies.name: ADX
phase6NativeFamilies.programProof: loaded independent ADCX and ADOX carry chains

phase6NativeFamilies.name: RDRAND/RDSEED
phase6NativeFamilies.programProof: loaded entropy instructions with complete defined-flag semantics

notApplicable.name: FSGSBASE
notApplicable.reason: all pinned Intel XED forms require mode64 and are not encodable in legacy32

notApplicable.name: CX16
notApplicable.reason: CMPXCHG16B is not encodable in the selected legacy32 guest

notApplicable.name: LONG_MODE
notApplicable.reason: selected guest architecture is i386 legacy32

notApplicable.name: SYSCALL
notApplicable.reason: selected guest uses reviewed WoW64 syscall and Unix-call boundaries
